sections.paragraph:
verb לעטור

to encircle, surround; crown

verb להיעטר

be encircled; crowned

verb לעטר

to adorn, decorate, ornament; crown; illustrate; surround

verb עוטר

be adorned, decorated, ornamented; crowned; be surrounded; illustrated

verb להתעטר

to adorn oneself

verb להעטיר

to crown

verb הועטר

be crowned; decorated, adorned

verb לעטר (>>עיטר)

to adorn, decorate, ornament; crown
